name: DevUtils
description: All-in-one native macOS developer utilities — JSON/JWT/regex/UUID/cron/URL tools that work offline.

seo.title: DevUtils — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: DevUtils: All-in-one native macOS developer utilities — JSON/JWT/regex/UUID/cron/URL tools that work offline.

when_to_use: Offline JWT decode and inspect during API debugging
JSON formatter and validator without leaving the Mac
UUID generation and regex testing in one native tool
Cron expression builder to validate scheduled job syntax
URL encoding/decoding during integration testing workflows

cons: Feature set overlaps free web tools
review.verdict: A quiet workhorse for Mac devs — once installed, you stop pasting tokens into sketchy online JWT debuggers.
review.best_for: macOS developers who handle JSON, JWT, regex, and cron daily and value privacy
review.not_for: Cross-platform devs or anyone fine with free browser-based utilities

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock

lock_in.reason: Local desktop utilities, no data lock
